leadText: Magma Hideout may refer to either of the following bases of Team Magma: For Team Magma's base located in Lilycove in Pokémon Ruby and Omega Ruby, see Team Magma Hideout For Team Magma's base located at the Jagged Pass in Pokémon Emerald, see Magma Hideout (Jagged Pass) For the Pokémon Trading Card Game card, see Team Magma Hideout (EX Team Magma vs Team Aqua 83)
